"vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-506", "name": "Embedded Malicious Code"}], "description": "## Impact

On April 29, 2026, compromised versions of `@cap-js/sqlite@2.2.2`, `@cap-js/postgres@2.2.2`, and `@cap-js/db-service@2.10.1` were published.
The malicious packages harvested credentials and attempted self-propagation.
If a compromised version was installed, all credentials accessible on that machine (npm tokens, cloud provider credentials, SSH keys, GitHub PATs) should be considered compromised.

## Patches

Upgrade to `@cap-js/sqlite` >= 2.4.0, `@cap-js/postgres` >= 2.3.0, `@cap-js/db-service` >= 2.11.0.
If a compromised version was ever installed, rotate all affected credentials.

## Workarounds

No workarounds.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00384, "percentile": 0.30597}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-20T15:33:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46421"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-20T15:33:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cap-js/cds-dbs/security/advisories/GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8", "https://me.sap.com/notes/3747787", "https://www.sap.com/documents/2026/05/8203a8b9-4d7f-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html", "https://www.stepsecurity.io/blog/a-mini-shai-hulud-has-appeared", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cap-js/cds-dbs/security-advisories/GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cap-js/cds-dbs", "summary": " Supply chain compromise via malicious package versions (@cap-js/sqlite,  @cap-js/postgres, @cap-js/db-service)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T15:33:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pvw4-cvr4-97p8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.3.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@cap-js/sqlite"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 2.2.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.3.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@cap-js/postgres"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 2.2.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.11.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@cap-js/db-service"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 2.10.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Supply chain compromise via malicious package versions (@cap-js/sqlite,  @cap-js/postgres, @cap-js/db-service)
